description:
WebView wrapper for the TheWallApp wallpaper website
WallApp is a lightweight WebView-based application that provides access to
the TheWallApp wallpaper website.

It allows users to browse and set wallpapers directly from
https://thewallapp.pages.dev using a simple native Android wrapper.

Features:
- Lightweight and fast
- No ads
- No trackers
- Fully open-source

The app does not collect or store any personal data.
